commands_run: pwd && rg --files data/identity-overrides data/review_notes raw wiki | head -200
jq 'keys' data/identity-overrides/merges.json
rg -n 'do.?not.?merge|do_not_merge|dont.?merge|identity136|identity135|global_kind.*entity|\"global_kind\": \"entity\"' data/identity-overrides data/review_notes
jq '.aliases.entity | length, (.aliases.entity | to_entries[-5:])' data/identity-overrides/merges.json
jq '.pairs.entity | length, .pairs.entity[-10:]' data/identity-overrides/do-not-merge.json
head -3 data/canonical/entities.jsonl && wc -l data/canonical/entities.jsonl
jq '{batch_id,global_kind,prepared_count, sample:(.proposed_aliases[:2])}' data/review_notes/codex-identity-batch133-prep.json data/review_notes/codex-identity-batch118-prep.json
jq 'type, keys, {aliases_type:(.aliases|type), aliases_keys:(.aliases|keys?)}' data/identity-overrides/merges.json
jq 'type, keys, if type=="array" then .[0:3] else . end' data/identity-overrides/do-not-merge.json
sqlite3 data/canonical.db '.tables'
sqlite3 data/canonical.db 'pragma table_info(entities); pragma table_info(records); pragma table_info(evidence_refs); pragma table_info(identity_aliases); pragma table_info(do_not_merge);'
jq '.aliases.entity | to_entries | length, (to_entries? // empty)' data/identity-overrides/merges.json
bun --eval '<read-only exact-name entity duplicate miner over data/canonical/entities.jsonl, merges.json, do-not-merge.json, and prior prep aliases; strict filters returned no printed candidates>'
bun --eval '<read-only loosened exact-name entity duplicate miner over data/canonical/entities.jsonl, merges.json, and do-not-merge.json; no printed candidates due script issue>'
bun --eval 'console.log("hello")'

sqlite3 -header -column data/canonical.db "select lower(replace(replace(entity_name,'.',''),',','')) as norm_name, count(*) c, group_concat(record_id, ' | ') ids, group_concat(entity_type, ' / ') types from entities where entity_name is not null and entity_name != '' and record_id not in (select alias from identity_aliases where kind='entity') group by norm_name having c>1 order by c desc, norm_name limit 80;"

sqlite3 -header -csv data/canonical.db "select r.record_id, e.entity_name, e.entity_type, e.description, r.primary_source_id from entities e join records r using(record_id) where lower(e.entity_name) in (select lower(e2.entity_name) from entities e2 group by lower(e2.entity_name) having count(*)>1) order by lower(e.entity_name), r.record_id limit 200;"
sqlite3 -header -csv data/canonical.db "select ia.alias, ia.target from identity_aliases ia where ia.kind='entity' and (...) order by target, alias;"

sqlite3 -header -csv data/canonical.db "with selected(id) as (...) select r.record_id, e.entity_name, e.entity_type, e.description, r.display_name, r.primary_source_id, group_concat(json_extract(er.ref_json,'$.evidence_id'),' | ') evidence from selected s join records r on r.record_id=s.id join entities e on e.record_id=s.id left join evidence_refs er on er.record_id=s.id group by r.record_id order by r.record_id;"

sqlite3 -header -column data/canonical.db "with pairs(alias,target) as (...) select 'existing_identity_alias' check_name, ia.* from identity_aliases ia join pairs p on ia.kind='entity' and ia.alias=p.alias union all select 'do_not_merge', d.kind, d.record_id_a, d.record_id_b, d.source_decision from do_not_merge d join pairs p on d.kind='entity' and ((d.record_id_a=p.alias and d.record_id_b=p.target) or (d.record_id_a=p.target and d.record_id_b=p.alias));"
jq -r '.aliases.entity[] | .key' data/identity-overrides/merges.json | rg -x '<selected alias ids>' || true
jq '.aliases.entity[0:5], .aliases.entity[-5:]' data/identity-overrides/merges.json

sqlite3 -header -csv data/canonical.db "select r.record_id, e.entity_name, e.entity_type, e.description, r.primary_source_id, group_concat(json_extract(er.ref_json,'$.evidence_id'),' | ') evidence from records r join entities e using(record_id) left join evidence_refs er using(record_id) where r.record_id in (...) group by r.record_id order by r.record_id;"
jq -r '.aliases.entity | type' data/identity-overrides/merges.json && jq -r '.aliases.entity | to_entries[0:5][] | @json' data/identity-overrides/merges.json
jq -r '.aliases.entity | to_entries[] | .key' data/identity-overrides/merges.json | rg -x '<selected alias ids>' || true
jq -r '.pairs.entity[] | .record_ids | @tsv' data/identity-overrides/do-not-merge.json | rg '<selected alias ids>' || true
rg -n '<selected evidence block ids>' raw/sources/<selected sources>/blocks.jsonl | head -80
test -e data/review_notes/codex-identity-batch136-prep.json; echo $?
commands_not_run: No provider-backed commands or agent harness commands were run.
No canonicalize*, campaign dedup, identity-review, write, ask, schema, ontology-normalize, or --profile/provider command was run.
No full validate command was run.
No edits were made to canonical JSONL, wiki pages, DB files, LOG.md, manifests, retired submissions, submissions, or data/identity-overrides/merges.json.
